codacy.description: Codacy code quality and static analysis — reads .codacy.yml, surfaces issues, enforces max-rigor lock

mercadopago-mcp-server.description: MercadoPago payments integration — checkout, split, ledger, KYC in BRL

stripe.description: Stripe Connect onboarding, payments, payouts — platform-account scoped via sk_test_/rk_test_

railway.description: Railway infrastructure — deploy backend/worker/frontend services, inspect logs, manage env vars

datadog.description: Datadog observability — dashboards, metrics, APM traces, log search (read-only by default)

sentry.description: Sentry error tracking — issue triage, stack traces, release health, performance monitoring

vercel.description: Vercel frontend hosting — preview deploys, production domains, project configuration

codecov.description: Codecov coverage analysis — PR coverage diffs, trend reports, flag-based coverage gates

github.description: GitHub API — issues, PRs, actions, releases, repository management via gh CLI
